revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:1 nguŏk 21 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:1月21日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 1월 21일]][[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 21 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:正月廿一]][[zh:正月廿一]]
{{Not to be confused with|January 21|qq=January 21}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=一月廿一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 1월 21일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar January|qq=}} '''January 21''' is the 21st day of the month {{ill|Zhengyue|en|Zhengyue|qid=Q1072983|lt=January (Mutsuki)|1=Zhengyue}}, the 1st month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842|1=senpu}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Tenpyō|en|Tenpyō|qid=Q1199879|lt=Tenpyō|1=Tenpyō}} 17th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|745|en|745|qid=Q23612|lt=745|1=745}} {{ill|February 26|de|February 26|ja|February 26|zh|February 26|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/February 26|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – The popular monk {{ill|Gyōki|en|Gyōki|qid=Q1136664|lt=Gyōki|1=Gyōki}} became known by the name “Dai Monk-【Sei】” (大Monk正). * {{ill|Enchō|en|Enchō|qid=Q1327274|lt=Enchō|1=Enchō}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|927|en|927|qid=Q30470|lt=927|1=927}} {{ill|February 25|de|February 25|ja|February 25|zh|February 25|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/February 25|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – Fujiwara Tadahei submitted the Engishiki. * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1866|en|1866|qid=Q7712|lt=1866|1=1866}} {{ill|March 7|de|March 7|ja|March 7|zh|March 7|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March 7|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – The mediation of Sakamoto Ryōma and others led to the formation of the Satsuma–Chōshū Alliance (薩長同盟), uniting the two domains in support of overthrowing the bakufu.
== Births == * {{ill|Kyōroku|de|Kyōroku|ja|Kyōroku|zh|Kyōroku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyōroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1530|en|1530|qid=Q6429|lt=1530|1=1530}} {{ill|February 18|de|February 18|ja|February 18|zh|February 18|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/February 18|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – {{ill|Uesugi Kenshin|en|Uesugi Kenshin|qid=Q311080|lt=Uesugi Kenshin|1=Uesugi Kenshin}}, a military commander (died {{ill|1578|en|1578|qid=Q6707|lt=1578|1=1578}}). * {{ill|Kanbun (era)|en|Kanbun (era)|qid=Q1146228|lt=Kanbun|1=Kanbun (era)}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1668|en|1668|qid=Q7595|lt=1668|1=1668}} {{ill|March 3|de|March 3|ja|March 3|zh|March 3|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March 3|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – {{ill|Mōri Yoshitsugu|de|Mōri Yoshitsugu|ja|毛利吉就|zh|毛利吉就|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mōri Yoshitsugu|1=Mōri Yoshinari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11547586}}, lord of the Chōshū Domain (died {{ill|1694|en|1694|qid=Q7694|lt=1694|1=1694}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|de|Meiji era|ja|明治元年|zh|Meiji era|lt=Meiji|lt_de=Meiji|lt_ja=明治|lt_zh=Meiji|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji era|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1868年|1=1868|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q7717}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|qid=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} {{ill|February 14|de|February 14|ja|February 14|zh|February 14|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/February 14|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – {{ill|Keisuke Okada|en|Keisuke Okada|qid=Q714951|lt=Okada Keisuke|1=Keisuke Okada}}, the 31st Prime Minister of Japan (died {{ill|1952|en|1952|qid=Q5272|lt=1952|1=1952}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Kantoku|en|Kantoku|qid=Q1193536|lt=Kantoku|1=Kantoku}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1045|en|1045|qid=Q19351|lt=1045|1=1045}} {{ill|February 7|de|February 7|ja|February 7|zh|February 7|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/February 7|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Suzaku|en|Emperor Go-Suzaku|qid=Q349296|lt=Go-Suzaku Tennō|1=Emperor Go-Suzaku}}, the 69th Emperor of Japan (born {{ill|1009|en|1009|qid=Q19236|lt=1009|1=1009}}). * {{ill|Shōchō|en|Shōchō|qid=Q1193070|lt=Shōchō|1=Shōchō}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1428|en|1428|qid=Q6315|lt=1428|1=1428}} {{ill|February 3|de|February 3|ja|February 3|zh|February 3|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/February 3|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshimochi|en|Ashikaga Yoshimochi|qid=Q466287|lt=Ashikaga Yoshimitsu|1=Ashikaga Yoshimochi}}, the 4th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (born {{ill|1386|en|1386|qid=Q6355|lt=1386|1=1386}}). * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 19th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1614|en|1614|qid=Q6781|lt=1614|1=1614}} {{ill|February 26|de|February 26|ja|February 26|zh|February 26|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/February 26|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – {{ill|Mogami Yoshiaki|en|Mogami Yoshiaki|qid=Q839377|lt=Mogami Yoshikazu|1=Mogami Yoshiaki}}, the first lord of the Yamagata Domain (born {{ill|1546|en|1546|qid=Q6533|lt=1546|1=1546}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji|1=Meiji era}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1871|en|1871|qid=Q7746|lt=1871|1=1871}} {{ill|March 8|de|March 8|ja|March 8|zh|March 8|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March 8|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – {{ill|Nabeshima Naomasa|en|Nabeshima Naomasa|qid=Q3334677|lt=Nabeshima Naomasa|1=Nabeshima Naomasa}}, lord of the Saga Domain (born {{ill|1815|en|1815|qid=Q6948|lt=1815|1=1815}}).
== Commemorations == * [[Masakusa-no-Matsuri]] – A festival held at Shōfuku-ji (鳥羽市) in Mie Prefecture celebrating the legend of a sacred boat.
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|1|17|1|19|12|18|2|1|0118|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
